steps.title: Identify what supports the conclusion
steps.content: The conclusion is that Great Britain had more damaging fungus species than either of the other two countries. Supporting data must compare Great Britain's fungus count against both Switzerland's and Hungary's.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Choice C does exactly this: $290$ damaging fungus species in Great Britain — more than either Switzerland or Hungary reported.
  • A only mentions Hungary
  • B compares fungus to insects (different categories)
  • D mentions both other countries but doesn't reference Great Britain's count
.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
